---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear and concise description of the feature or improvement.

## Problem Statement

Is this related to a problem or limitation? If so, describe it here.

## Proposed Solution

How would you like this feature to work? Describe your proposed solution.

## Alternatives Considered

Have you considered alternative solutions or approaches?

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information, diagrams, or mockups that might help.
